name: Descriptions
description: Key-value pair list for read-only entity details.

api.name: Descriptions
api.description: Key-value pair list for read-only entity details.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: One or more DescriptionsItem elements, rendered inside the <dl>.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Optional heading rendered above the description list.

parameters.name: Bordered
parameters.description: Wraps the list in a bordered card and separates items with divider lines instead of gaps.

parameters.name: Column
parameters.description: Number of grid columns the items are laid out into: 1, 2, 3, or 4. Any other value falls back to 3.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer container.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer container.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<Descriptions Title="User Details" Column="2">
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Name">John Doe</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Email">john@example.com</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Role">Administrator</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Status">Active</DescriptionsItem>
</Descriptions>

examples.title: Bordered
examples.code:
<Descriptions Title="Order Details" Bordered="true" Column="3">
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Order ID">#2024-0127</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Date">Jan 27, 2025</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Status">Shipped</DescriptionsItem>
</Descriptions>

examples.title: Four Columns
examples.code:
<Descriptions Title="Specs" Bordered="true" Column="4">
    <DescriptionsItem Label="CPU">8-core</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="RAM">16 GB</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="Storage">512 GB</DescriptionsItem>
    <DescriptionsItem Label="GPU">Integrated</DescriptionsItem>
</Descriptions>

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The value content, rendered inside the <dd>.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: The term text, rendered inside the <dt>. When omitted, the <dt> is still rendered (empty, visually hidden via sr-only) so the term/description pairing stays valid for screen readers.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's wrapping <div>.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's wrapping <div>.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: One or more DescriptionsItem elements, rendered inside the <dl>.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The value content, rendered inside the <dd>.

mdSummary:
# Descriptions

Key-value pair list for read-only entity details.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/descriptions

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Descriptions | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | One or more DescriptionsItem elements, rendered inside the \<dl\>. |
| Descriptions | Title | `string?` | `` | Optional heading rendered above the description list. |
| Descriptions | Bordered | `bool` | `false` | Wraps the list in a bordered card and separates items with divider lines instead of gaps. |
| Descriptions | Column | `int` | `3` | Number of grid columns the items are laid out into: 1, 2, 3, or 4. Any other value falls back to 3. |
| Descriptions | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the outer container. |
| Descriptions | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the outer container. |
| DescriptionsItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The value content, rendered inside the \<dd\>. |
| DescriptionsItem | Label | `string?` | `` | The term text, rendered inside the \<dt\>. When omitted, the \<dt\> is still rendered (empty, visually hidden via sr-only) so the term/description pairing stays valid for screen readers. |
| DescriptionsItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the item's wrapping \<div\>. |
| DescriptionsItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the item's wrapping \<div\>. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Descriptions) — One or more DescriptionsItem elements, rendered inside the \<dl\>.
- `ChildContent` (DescriptionsItem) — The value content, rendered inside the \<dd\>.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `DescriptionsItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Descriptions />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Descriptions/Descriptions.razor`
- `UI/Descriptions/DescriptionsItem.razor`
